query: SELECT id, filename, originalFilename, s3Key, s3Url, status, errorMessage FROM documents WHERE errorMessage LIKE '%URI malformed%' OR errorMessage LIKE '%malformed%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Z2xfqxX78EXkQD.root --database jEmfNUXyx8HPzkbK4tmeAP --execute SELECT id, filename, originalFilename, s3Key, s3Url, status, errorMessage FROM documents WHERE errorMessage LIKE '%URI malformed%' OR errorMessage LIKE '%malformed%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
